title: Weekly Operational Report — site-001
subtitle: 2026-03-09 to 2026-03-15
executiveSummary: The site is currently in a constrained state. 5 active signal(s) and 3 active constraint(s) were detected during the weekly diagnostic cycle.
priorityActions: Inspect flow bottlenecks and reduce operational delay sources.
Audit revenue capture points and leakage-prone handoffs.
Stabilize reporting discipline and reduce missing operational inputs.
Prepare operating buffers for unstable demand conditions.
Review cross-role coordination points and operational handoff failures.

sections.title: Executive Summary
sections.content: The site is currently in a constrained state. 5 active signal(s) and 3 active constraint(s) were detected during the weekly diagnostic cycle.

sections.title: Metric Overview
sections.content: Throughput: 1480 units/week | Utilization: 0.9262 ratio | Latency: 34 minutes | Revenue Leakage: 630 | Staffing Pressure: 18.9009 / 100 | Reporting Reliability: 71.3643 / 100

sections.title: Signal Overview
sections.content: latency_signal [MEDIUM]: Average cycle time shows moderate delay. | leakage_signal [HIGH]: Revenue leakage is materially high. | volatility_signal [MEDIUM]: Demand volatility is moderate. | reporting_gap_signal [MEDIUM]: Reporting reliability is below target. | constraint_signal [HIGH]: Structural constraints are affecting operational performance.

sections.title: Constraints
sections.content: flow [MEDIUM]: Flow constraint driven by elevated latency. | reporting [MEDIUM]: Reporting constraint driven by weak reporting reliability. | coordination [HIGH]: Coordination constraint inferred from simultaneous leakage and latency.

sections.title: Priority Actions
sections.content: Inspect flow bottlenecks and reduce operational delay sources. | Audit revenue capture points and leakage-prone handoffs. | Stabilize reporting discipline and reduce missing operational inputs. | Prepare operating buffers for unstable demand conditions. | Review cross-role coordination points and operational handoff failures.

linkedSnapshot.diagnosticSummary: Operational state is constrained. Active signals: latency_signal, leakage_signal, volatility_signal, reporting_gap_signal, constraint_signal. Active constraints: flow, reporting, coordination.
